channel.title: Blog | Ferhat Atagün
channel.description: Software, AI tools (MCP, GPT, Cursor) and frontend notes.

item.title: Prompt caching is the cheapest Claude optimization. Nobody measures it.
item.description: Every Claude response carries cache-hit data. Most apps log it nowhere — and pay for it. Why hit ratio is the metric nobody graphs, and the four-field log line that pays for itself in a week.

item.title: Your prompt isn't better. You just remember it being better.
item.description: Most teams iterate on prompts by feel and ship by memory. The minimum useful comparison is two prompts in parallel, surfacing output, latency and cost on the same input — what side-by-side reveals that sequential never does.

item.title: Build the sandbox before you write a single tool
item.description: Most agent teams write the tools first, then discover the design was wrong. Mock the tool responses, role-play the loop by hand, and kill the bad tool designs in fifteen minutes — before they touch your codebase.

item.title: How I debug Claude agents by replaying their trace
item.description: Agent traces contain everything you need to debug a weird run, but they're stored as walls of nested JSON. The reframe: stop reading them as documents, start watching them as timelines of decisions. Bugs that take 30 minutes in an editor become obvious in 30 seconds.

item.title: Building a streaming Claude client in the browser — without the SDK
item.description: Why I skipped the official Anthropic SDK for browser work, and the ~150 lines of TypeScript that replaced it: a hand-rolled SSE parser with tool-use support, clean aborts, and meaningful errors.

item.title: Rules and Commands That Actually Stick
item.description: How to make .cursorrules and slash commands useful instead of forgotten: start from pain, keep the list short, iterate from real usage.

item.title: Neden Bazen Sadece Boş Ekrana Bakıyorum
item.description: Hiçbir tuşa basmadan ekrana bakmak da işin parçası. Verimlilik kültürüne ters bir itiraf.

item.title: Bitmemiş Projeler Mezarlığım ve Neden Rahatım
item.description: Yarım kalan side project'ler başarısızlık mı? Bence bazen sadece keşfin kendisi.

item.title: "Best Practice" Dediklerimizin Yarısı Ezber
item.description: DRY, test coverage, yorum yazmak… Kurallar bağlam olmadan anlamsız. Cesur bir tez.

item.title: Yapay Zeka ile Yazılım Geliştirme: MCP, GPT ve Cursor
item.description: LLM araçları, Model Context Protocol (MCP) ve Cursor ile günlük geliştirme pratiğinde nasıl daha verimli olunur.

item.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Nedir?
item.description: MCP, AI asistanlarının dosya sistemine, API'lere ve araçlara güvenli erişimini standartlaştıran açık protokol.

item.title: Cursor IDE ve Prompt Mühendisliği
item.description: Cursor’da @dosya, @web kullanımı, net talimatlar ve .cursorrules ile daha tutarlı ve verimli AI kullanımı.
